sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO td_config_version (version_id, config_id, version, config_content, changelog, created_time, created_by) VALUES (#[versionId], #[configId], #[version], #[configContent], #[changelog], #[createdTime], #[createdBy])
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM td_config_version WHERE config_id = #[configId] AND version = #[version]
SELECT * FROM td_config_version WHERE config_id = #[configId] ORDER BY created_time DESC
